prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `0f63c0b9`.
codex_response:
Implemented `TASK_ID 0f63c0b9` end-to-end. The rule is: sort the isolated colored cells by row, split the grid into horizontal bands at row midpoints, paint each band’s left/right borders in that cell’s color, fill that cell’s own row across the full width, and force the global top and bottom rows to be full in the topmost and bottommost colors. I used the summary hint because it matched the official examples; no correction note was needed.

The task package is [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_0f63c0b9/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_0f63c0b9/verifier.py#L4), and [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_0f63c0b9/generator.py#L4). The generator stays on-family by using fixed 15x15 grids, 3-4 interior singleton seeds, unique colors, random columns, and row layouts constrained to produce the same 3-7 row band sizes seen in the official task. No new shared primitive was needed.

Verification/build results: official verifier passed `5/5`, and the shared builder produced `1000` verified examples. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0f63c0b9/task.json), [examples](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0f63c0b9/examples), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0f63c0b9/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0f63c0b9/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0f63c0b9/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0f63c0b9/previews/preview_03.png).
